Registration 会议注册
Complete your WAICA 2026 registration and payment via the GDPS payment portal. You will be redirected to log in, select a ticket type, and complete payment. 请通过 GDPS 支付平台完成 WAICA 2026 注册与缴费。点击后将跳转至登录、选票及支付页面。
Online Payment 在线支付
POLICIES AND PROCEDURES 政策与须知
All participants must register and pay the appropriate fee in order to
participate and access the WAICA 2026 program. 所有参会人员必须完成注册并缴纳相应费用，方可参与会议及获取 WAICA 2026 会议日程权限。
Each accepted paper must have at least one author registered as a Regular attendee. 每一篇中稿的论文至少要有一个人注册成为Regular。
Each accepted workshop paper must have at least one author registered with a Workshop Pass. 每一篇中稿的专题研讨会论文至少要有一个人注册成为 Workshop Pass。
Registration Fees 注册费用
Category 类型
Early (until 16 Jul 2026) 提前注册（截至 2026 年 7 月 16 日）
Late 现场注册
Conference 会议注册
Regular 一般代表
Benefits 其他权益
All WAICA participants will receive a complimentary WAIC exhibition pass. 所有 WAICA 参会者将获赠 WAIC 展览通票。
Scholars with accepted Regular Papers are eligible to apply for Shanghai AI for Science “Hundred Teams, Hundred Projects” . Regular Paper 中稿学者具备申报上海市科学智能“百团百项”的资格。

https://waica2026.worldaic.com.cn/partic.label: 参会指南
https://waica2026.worldaic.com.cn/partic.relevant_text:
Participant Guide 参会指南
Registration 注册
Endorsement 企业认可
Dear Participants: 尊敬的各位参会嘉宾：
Welcome to the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference · Academic (WAIC-Academic, WAICA). To help you smoothly complete registration, download the official App, and arrive at each venue on time, we have specially prepared this guide. Please complete the following three preparation steps before attending. 欢迎参加 2026 世界人工智能大会·学术（WAIC-Academic，WAICA）。为帮助您顺利完成注册、下载官方 App 并准时抵达各会场，我们特编写本指南。请在参会前按以下三步完成准备工作。
I. Step One: Registration on the WAICA Official Website 一、第一步：WAICA 官网注册
Before attending, please first complete registration and payment on the WAICA official website. The registration entrance is located on the Registration page of the official website. 参会前，请先在 WAICA 官方网站完成注册与缴费。注册入口位于官网的 Registration（注册）页面。
1. Open the WAICA official website registration page: 1. 打开 WAICA 官方网站注册页面： https://waica2026.worldaic.com.cn/registration/
The Registration page of the WAICA official website WAICA 官网 Registration（注册）页面
2. On the Registration page, click the “Online Payment” button to enter the registration and payment platform. For first-time use, please first Create Account: fill in Full Name, Email, Phone (optional), and Password (at least 6 characters), then click “REGISTER”. 2.在 Registration 页面点击“Online Payment（在线支付）”按钮，进入注册与缴费平台。首次使用请先创建账户（Create Account）：填写 Full Name（姓名）、Email（邮箱）、Phone（手机号，可选）、Password（密码，至少 6 位），点击“REGISTER（注册）”。
Create Account 创建账户（Create Account）
3. After logging in, go to the “Select Pass & Registration” page, choose your pass type according to your identity, and complete the online payment: General Representative ¥4,000, Student ¥2,000, Workshop Pass ¥2,500; you may use a QR code for online payment at checkout. 3. 登录后进入“Select Pass & Registration（选择票种）”页面，按身份选择票种并完成在线支付：General Representative（普通代表）¥4,000、Student（学生）¥2,000、Workshop Pass（研讨会通票）¥2,500；结算时可使用二维码在线支付。
Select Pass & Registration and pay online 选择票种并在线支付（Select Pass & Registration）
4. Once payment is successful, registration is complete. Please remember your account (email) and password, as you will need to log in with the same account when downloading the App later. 4. 缴费成功后即完成注册，请牢记账号（邮箱）与密码，后续下载 App 需使用同一账号登录。
Note for overseas participants: Please make sure your Full Name and ID information exactly match your passport, so as to facilitate on-site entry verification. 境外参会人员提示：Full Name 与证件信息请与护照保持完全一致，以便现场入场核验。
II. Step Two: Scan the QR Code to Download and Register the “Hi WAIC” App 二、第二步：扫码下载并注册「Hi WAIC」App
Hi WAIC is the sole designated official ticketing platform of WAIC 2026, used for collecting electronic tickets, entry verification, viewing the conference schedule, map navigation, and shuttle information. Please be sure to download and register it. Hi WAIC 是 WAIC 2026 唯一指定官方票务平台，用于领取电子票、入场核验、查看会议日程、地图导览及接驳信息。请务必下载并注册。
5. Use your phone camera or WeChat “Scan” to scan the QR code below to download the Hi WAIC App (available on both iOS and Android). 5. 使用手机相机或微信“扫一扫”，扫描下方二维码下载 Hi WAIC App（iOS / Android 均已上架）。
6. Open the App and log in with the same phone number / email account used when registering on the official website. 6. 打开 App，使用与官网注册时相同的手机号 / 邮箱账号登录。
7. Complete real-name authentication, and bind or collect your WAICA electronic participation credential / ticket within the App. 7. 完成实名认证，在 App 内绑定或领取您的 WAICA 电子参会证 / 门票。
8. It is recommended to enable location and notification permissions in order to receive schedule reminders, venue navigation, and shuttle bus information. 8. 建议开启定位与通知权限，以便接收日程提醒、场馆导航与接驳车信息。
Scan the QR code to download the Hi WAIC App 扫码下载 Hi WAIC App
When entering, please show your electronic ticket (QR code) in the App, and bring your own ID (ID card / passport) for verification. 入场时请在 App 内出示电子票（二维码），并携带本人证件（身份证 / 护照）以备核验。
III. Step Three: Attendance and Transportation Guide for the 18th–20th 三、第三步：18–20 日参会与交通指南
3.1 Conference Schedule and Venue Overview 3.1 会议日程与场馆一览
This edition of WAICA will be held from Saturday, July 18 to Monday, July 20, 2026. The conference is distributed across three venues: the Expo Exhibition Hall, the Expo Center, and the Xuhui West Bund International Convention & Exhibition Center. Please note the venue corresponding to the sessions you are attending, and plan your route in advance. 本届 WAICA 于 2026 年 7 月 18 日（周六）至 7 月 20 日（周一）举办，会议分布在三个场馆：世博展览馆、世博中心、徐汇西岸国际会展中心。请留意您所参加场次对应的场馆，提前规划路线。
July 18 (Saturday) 7 月 18 日（星期六）

Call for Demo Papers Launched
ICDM 2026 invites submissions to the Demo Track, which provides a platform for researchers and practitioners to showcase innovative, fully implemented data mining systems through interactive demonstrations. These awards are intended to help offset the cost of attending the conference. The exact amount and type of grant will be determined by the selection committee, with awards ranging from $500 to $800.

Latest Announcements
Stay updated with conference news
Sanctions
In preparing the NeurIPS 2026 handbook, we included a link to a US government sanctions tool that covers a significantly broader set of restrictions than those NeurIPS is actually required to follow. This error was due to miscommunication between the NeurIPS Foundation and our legal team; there was never an intention to restrict participation beyond our mandatory compliance obligations. The responsibility for that error is ours as an organization, and we deeply apologize for the alarm and impact this miscommunication had on our community.
We have updated the link and clarified the text of our policy, which is consistent with that of ACM and IEEE, as well as other international conferences and NeurIPS in the past. As in previous years, NeurIPS welcomes submissions from all compliant institutions and individuals.
We want to reiterate that NeurIPS is a community-driven event, created by and for the community, and strives to be inclusive. The NeurIPS 2026 organizing committee was particularly saddened to learn of this institutional miscommunication. The organizing committee has taken on the responsibility of running the conference this year with the goal of fostering open communication, knowledge sharing, and global scientific discourse.
May 04, 2026

Jun 23 : We have extended the deadline for camera-ready submission to June 30, AoE.
Jun 23 : We are aware of the strong interest in camera-ready instructions. You will soon get an invite from the Meteor submission system, but you can already start preparing the final version. Here are the key details:
Jun 3 : Call for Doctoral Consortium has been posted
Jun 1: Registration will open on June 17th
May 26: Book Your Hotel
May 15 : Accepted Tutorials have been posted here
Mar 4 : We have extended the deadline for completing OpenReview profiles and author/reviewer/AC/SAC enrollments to Friday, March 6th, 11 pm CET . This deadline is final and will not be extended .
Mar 2 : Some of you might have noticed that, for a brief period, the "Paper registration deadline" incorrectly stated March 2nd. That was due to a misunderstanding on the web team's side. Our sincere apologies for giving any false hopes! The "Paper registration deadline" has expired on February 26th, as communicated earlier. Authors can complete their profiles and all the necessary enrollments by March 2nd, 11pm CET. (Note that the information in the OpenReview remained accurate the entire time.) Since the wrong date appeared on the website well after registration had already closed, it has not affected any submissions. That is, it did not provide any advantage or disadvantage to anyone.
Feb 26 : We are extending the deadline for completing the OpenReview Profiles and Author Enrollment Forms to March 2nd, 11pm CET.

Jun 7: Recorded videos from Tutorials, Workshops, Keynotes, Orals, and Opening Remark will be posted here as it becomes available over the next few days. Virtual and physical registrations have access.

Mar 6: Call for Demonstrations
Submission deadline is Mar 20, 2026 AOE, read more here.
Nov 30: Message from PCs regarding OpenReview security incident
On November 27, 2025, the CVPR 2026 Program Chairs were informed of a security vulnerability in OpenReview that temporarily exposed the identities of normally anonymous roles (authors, reviewers, and area chairs) across venues using the platform. The OpenReview team responded quickly, deploying a fix within one hour of being informed. Full details of the incident are available at https://openreview.net/forum/user|statement_regarding_api_security_incident .
Status for CVPR 2026 : There is no evidence that any reviewer or area chair identities were compromised for CVPR 2026, as no reviewers or area chairs had been assigned to papers during the vulnerability window.
Any form of harassment, retaliation, or use of leaked information in any way will not be tolerated and will result in the maximum penalties defined by our Code of Conduct.
We will continue to monitor this situation and provide updates as necessary. We remain committed to maintaining the integrity of the CVPR peer review process.
Nov 13: Update on full paper & compute form submission issue
We would like to inform authors that the OR submission system requires the submission of a compute reporting form along with any updates to the full paper. We have identified this as a system-related issue. As a workaround, authors can submit a "dummy" compute form, which can be edited until the Supplemental Material submission deadline. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.
Nov 7: I mportant Update: New Separate Deadlines for CVPR 2026
To improve system stability and provide a clearer submission process, we have introduced two new deadlines that are now separate from the Abstract and the Paper Submission deadlines:
Enrollment Form Deadline: Nov 16, 11:59pm AoE - complete your Author, Reviewer, Area Chair, and/or Senior Area Chair Enrollment Form(s)
OpenReview Profile Deadline: Nov 16, 11:59pm AoE - ensure your OpenReview profile is complete and up-to-date
Thank you for your cooperation in helping us maintain a stable and efficient submission system.
For support requests, please use the Contact Us option below rather than contacting Program Chairs individually.
Nov 7: Im portant Update: Abstract Submission Deadline Extended
Due to an unexpected system issues prior to the abstract submission deadline, we are extending author registration and abstract submission by 24h until Nov 07, 2025 (Anywhere on Earth). We are working to restore access as quickly as possible.
Please note, however, that the paper submission deadline remains firm at Nov 13, 2025 (Anywhere on Earth), and cannot be extended under any circumstances. We encourage you to submit your papers early to ensure a smooth process.
We sincerely thank all authors for your understanding and patience during this period. Please stay tuned for further updates on this page and on our official X account: https://x.com/CVPR
Nov 5 : Compute Reporting Form - Clarification

ECCV 2026 REGISTRATION
Registration is now live here .
FOR AUTHORS
Every paper must be covered by a full registration by a listed author of the paper .
All papers must be covered by a full registration (NO STUDENT, NO Virtual).
Specifically:
A full registration allows you to register up to 2 papers.
Main Conference paper authors must be registered by 17 July 2026 (CEST).
Workshop paper authors must be registered by 5 August 2026 CEST.
Any inquiries or requests for additional information or cancellations are to be communicated to c to c events .
REGISTRATION FEES (VAT incl.)
Registration

Standard Rates

The Full and Student full registration fees include:
Access to all sessions and events September 8-12.
Refreshments throughout the conference plus lunch each day and one cocktail reception.
The Workshop/Tutorial registration fees include:
Access to sessions on September 8-9.
Refreshments and lunch each day.
The Virtual registration fees include:
Access to sessions on a dedicated virtual platform.
The accompanying person registration fee includes:
Conference reception on September 11. (Must be 18 years of age)
Credit Card
All major credit cards are accepted (VISA, Mastercard/Eurocard, American Express).
Bank Transfer
Cancellation Policy
All cancellations will be subject to a $65 cancellation fee before August 10, 2026, 11:59pm CEST. NO REFUNDS will be made after this deadline for any reason. Please email Marissa with any refund request. You are allowed to change the name on the registration without penalty and you can do this by logging into your registration yourself.
Visa / Invitation Letter / Guarantee Letter
After you have registered, you should receive an email within 15 minutes with instructions on how to get an invitation letter. If you don't receive the email, read on:
Within 15 minutes, a matching profile at https://eccv.ecva.net/ will be created if one doesn't already exist. If the account was created, it will have no password. Use reset password to set (or reset) your password. If you are logged in at https://eccv.ecva.net/ , you will see your name in the black navigation bar. If you are not logged in, click "Login" in the navigation bar.
Visit https://eccv.ecva.net/InvitationLetter to generate your invitation letter. The letter will be emailed to you. We do not store your passport number or birth date.

We are delighted to welcome the international CIKM community to Rome, a city where history, culture, and innovation meet. As we celebrate the 35th edition of the conference, we look forward to inspiring scientific exchange, new collaborations, and memorable experiences in one of the world’s most remarkable settings. Welcome to CIKM 2026 in Rome!

Registration
Procedure
Importand dates
Registration
Please, note that registrations and all reservations to the Conference must be made through the online form, and that registrations are considered valid only upon payment.
REGISTRATION WILL OPEN SOON
Fees and the registration form will be available soon
Please note that:
The Conference Secretariat will provide the invoice only after the payment has arrived, which usually takes from three to five workings days. Moreover, invoices are not issued automatically, so please consider that it will take at least another three to five working days for the secretariat to send them together with the confirmation of your registration.
The secretariat is open on Monday-Friday, 09.00 am – 01.00 pm / 02.00 pm – 06.00 pm
Registration Procedure
Registration
Registrations and all reservations to the Conference must be made through the online form
Please, note that registrations will be effective only after receiving the total amount due by bank transfer or by credit card.
Payments
Registration/reservation payments can be provided by:
– Credit card
SUBJECT LINE : CIKM 2026 + Name and Surname.
Please consider that receiving a payment from an unregistered participant doesn’t allow us to issue a regular invoice and, consequently, isn’t valid until registration is completed on our online platform.
Therefore, please complete the registration before making the payment to register for the Conference .
If you have any issues or questions regarding the registration, please contact us at cikm2026@grupposymposia.it .
Invoice
Your registration will be effective only after we have received the total amount due by bank transfer or by credit card. The Conference Secretariat will then provide the invoice/s.
In the ‘Invoice’ section of the registration form, please also specify the fiscal address and VAT/tax code:
– In the case of refunds from your Company/Institution, please select “Company”
All participants are required to carefully check the inserted data for the invoice(s).
Any change of the invoice details (such as address, VAT number etc.) is exclusively possible within 3 days from payment date and is subject to a 20 EUR extra fee. In case of doubt, please check with your company/institution administration first.
Italian participants only:
All refunds will be processed starting from one month after the Conference. A € 20 bank commission expense will be charged.
VISA Invitation letter
VISA letters can be asked to the Organizing Secretariat at cikm2026@grupposymposia.it , only after registering for the conference and paying the registration fee .
The Organizing Secretariat cannot send VISA letters before registration for security reasons.
IMPORTANT DATES
All deadlines are at 11:59pm in the Anywhere on Earth (AoE) time zone.
